surface_verification.justification: Data-only compliance regeneration + reconciliation: the diff touches only .shipwright governance artifacts (one event-log reconciliation event + regenerated RTM/dashboard/SBOM) and zero client/server/API/store/WS code, so there is no user-erlebbare surface. Executable verification (re-running the existing server+client suites, 3464/3464 green, to re-verify the behavior-touched FRs) is recorded under iterate_latest.unit.

behaviors.behavior: Re-running the full suite re-verifies the behavior-touched FRs (server 1671 + client 1793)
After the reconciliation event, all 22 declared behavior-touched FRs are reconciled (0 unreconciled)
behaviors.evidence: compute_reconciliation over the post-event log -> unreconciled=0/22 (was 12/22); dashboard 'Change reconciliation: 0/22 behavior-touched FRs not re-verified'

behaviors.behavior: Compliance docs regenerate with the current plugin: new Control-Grade block + RTM 'Reconciled?' column
behaviors.evidence: regenerated dashboard.md carries the cc1/cc2/cc3 rendering; traceability-matrix.md header includes the 'Reconciled?' column

behaviors.behavior: Control Grade recomputes A (>=90) from the regenerated inputs (stale-plugin B89 -> A98)
behaviors.evidence: regenerated dashboard.md 'Control Grade: A (98/100)'; all measurable dims green except Security (n/a, deferred AR-10)
